sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ عُمَرُ إِلَى الْمَكْتَبِ فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Omer je stigao u kancelariju u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Omar arrived at the office at eight in the morning.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لِزَمِيلِهِ «صَبَاحُ الْخَيْرِ» وَجَلَسَ عَلَى كُرْسِيِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je kolegi «dobro jutro» i sjeo na svoju stolicu.
sentences.translationEn: He said «good morning» to his colleague and sat in his chair.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ الْحَاسُوبَ وَبَدَأَ يَقْرَأُ رَسَائِلَ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Otvorio je računar i počeo čitati elektronsku poštu.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the computer and started reading emails.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَوْمًا مُنَظَّمًا وَبَدَأَهُ بِخُطْوَاتٍ وَاضِحَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Bio je to organizovan dan i počeo ga je jasnim koracima.
sentences.translationEn: It was an organized day and he started it with clear steps.
